description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test the VCPKG install that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build-test-install job on macOS-latest, ubuntu-20.04, and windows-2022, checking out the repository, setting up Python 3.11, and installing VCPKG. Configure, build, test, and install the project using CMake and VCPKG, then upload the resulting artifacts.
